title: Featured Work
text: Explore a selection of projects I’ve helped developed, ranging from responsive websites to fully featured mobile applications. Each project is crafted with a strong focus on performance, usability, and delivering a seamless user experience across devices.

galleryItems.description: I maintained and improved a WordPress website by fixing bugs that affected performance and user experience. I added and customized features using plugins and theme updates, keeping the site functional and up to date.
I supported the upkeep of a WordPress website by diagnosing and fixing bugs that impacted speed and usability, while enhancing features through plugin configurations and theme updates.
I ensured the stability of a WordPress website by addressing bugs and optimizing performance, and by integrating and adjusting features through plugins and updated themes.
